side_effects.description: Systemic fatigue at 5mg, felt tired for a few days when backing down, then titrated up to 10mg

protocol_notes: Started at 5mg, backed down due to fatigue, then titrated up to 10mg. Found 8mg to be optimal dose. Currently on 8mg daily. States human trials started at 10mg and titrated to 50mg over a year with amazing results. Believes low doses have zero evidence of efficacy and fatigue from higher doses is due to mitochondrial repair process working. Plans to cycle with Urolithin A (Mitopure) and interested in Humanin.
